title: Not the Only Ones
story: The team confirms the drops are part of a larger system and realizes other players are already moving through the same routes.
briefingTranscript: Yesterday was not random. The package was real, and someone else cleared the location after the team left.
A second route may hold another drop, but the bigger discovery is that the team is not alone anymore.
This run is about rhythm, not panic. Stay smooth, stay early, and beat the other players to the window.

artifact.title: Rival Trace
artifact.summary: A second drop confirms competing players are checking the same neighborhood routes.
artifact.unlockCondition: Reach the second drop ahead of the unseen rival.

reportBack.prompt: What changed on the second run?

options.label: It is still probably random
options.outcomeText: You miss the implication. The package feels important, but the pattern still slips through your fingers.

options.label: There are other players on the route
options.outcomeText: You call the real escalation. The team is not exploring anymore; they are competing inside a live system.

options.label: The timing is getting tighter
options.outcomeText: You catch part of it. Timing clearly matters, but the rival angle still needs one more clean read.

sideMissions.label: Beat Them There
sideMissions.promptText: Do not be late. Pick it up.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Okay. Yesterday was not random.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: We found a mystery package. That is not normal.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: I came back later. It was gone.

beats.title: New objective
beats.text: Check another location.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: I heard there might be another drop today.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: You heard or you guessed?

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Both.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: If this is a system, people are watching patterns. Stay steady.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: Who else knows about this?

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: That is what I am wondering.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: I saw someone yesterday. They were checking the same spots.

beats.title: Tone shift
beats.text: Audio cue: subtle tone shift.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Alright... so we are not the only ones.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Let us not be late. Pick it up.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: This is it.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Do not hesitate. Grab it.

beats.title: Drop found
beats.text: Audio cue: drop found.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: Okay this is officially a thing.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: This is a system.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: No. It is a game. And we are playing now.
